characters.name: Dad
characters.description: Dad is the father ofZouand uncle ofZinnya. Dad is white with black stripes and a grey snout with tall round , as he is a grévy's zebra. Dad also wears a blue shirt and dark blue jeans. Dad is the son of Grandma and Grandpa, the grandson ofNana Zebra, the husband ofMom, the uncle of Zinnya and the father ofZou (character).

characters.name: Mom
characters.description: Mom is the mother ofZou. She is always making stuff good for him and Poc. Mom is white with black stripes and a grey snout with tall round ears (as she is a grévy's zebra) and wears a yellow necklace and a red dress. Mom is the wife ofDad, the granddaughter-in-law ofNana Zebra, daughter-in-law of Grandma and Grandpa, the aunt of Zinnya and the mother ofZou (character).

characters.name: Zou (character)
characters.description: Zou (character)Background informationVoiceAubree YoungCharacter informationGenderMaleSpeciesGrevy's ZebraAge(s)5Source Zouis the protagonist ofZou. He is voiced by child actorKannon Gowen. He is an over-curious and the youngest grévy's zebra foal who wears yellow overalls and a white shirt and has a pet bird namedPoc, a green monk parakeet who is Zou’s trusty sidekick. This little quietgrévy's zebratot has lots of fun playing with his friends, including his next door best friend,Elzee Blackhoof. This Grévy's zebra foal is similar to Stripes the Mountain Zebra from Ice Kev the Elephant, here are two reasons why:
